caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in what appears to be a classroom or lecture hall, addressing an audience. He is wearing a lanyard with a badge around his neck. Initially, he gestures with both hands open, palms facing up, as if explaining or emphasizing a point. In the next moment, he brings his hands together, holding the lanyard between his fingers, possibly to make another point or transition in his speech. The background includes a whiteboard and a partially visible projection screen, suggesting an educational or professional setting. His body language indicates engagement and enthusiasm as he communicates.
